name: World Wonders Hunt
description: Travel the globe and find famous landmarks! Follow the clues, explore in Street View, and discover each hidden treasure.

locations.clue: I was built for a fair in the City of Light. Made of iron lattice, I shine bright at night. Find me where the Champ de Mars stretches wide.
locations.congratsMessage: Magnifique! You found the Eiffel Tower! 🗼

locations.clue: In an ancient city of emperors and gladiators, I once hosted their greatest spectacles. My arches have stood for nearly two thousand years.
I watch over Parliament beside the Thames. My bell is famous, though most people call the whole tower by its name. Look for me in London.
A gift from France that welcomes travelers by sea. I hold a torch and a tablet in New York's harbor. Liberty is my name.
locations.congratsMessage: Amazing! You found the Statue of Liberty! 🗽
